```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$volume_r2 = 
  round(summary(lm_vol_allo)$adj.r.squared,2)
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$volume_slope = 
  round(coef(lm_vol_allo)[2],2)

kable(modele_uav_perf_plot %>% select(uav_method, volume_bias,volume_bias_perc, 
                                  volume_mae,volume_rmse,
                                  volume_errabs,volume_cv,
                                  volume_r2,volume_slope),caption = table.caption("Performances des méthodes drone pour l'estimation du volume des parcelles (en m3)"))%>% kable_styling(font_size = 12, bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)

```

Performances pour la biomasse des troncs

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# performance pour la variable biomasse tronc
## bias absolu et relatif
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_trunk_bias =
  round(mean(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_mod_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_trunk_bias =
  round(mean(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_allo_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_trunk_bias_perc =
  round(mean((biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_mod_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha) / biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha)*100,2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_trunk_bias_perc =
  round(mean((biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_allo_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha) / biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha)*100,2)

## MAE et RMSE
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_trunk_mae = 
  round(mae(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_mod_ha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_trunk_mae = 
  round(mae(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_allo_ha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_trunk_rmse = 
  round(rmse(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_mod_ha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_trunk_rmse = 
  round(rmse(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_allo_ha),2)

## CV (a partir de l'ecart type de l'erreur absolue)
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_trunk_errabs = 
  sd(abs(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_mod_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha))*100

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_trunk_errabs = 
  sd(abs(biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_uav_allo_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_trunk_tha))*100

modele_uav_perf_plot = modele_uav_perf_plot %>% mutate(biomass_trunk_cv = round(biomass_trunk_errabs / biomass_trunk_mae,2))

## R2 et pente
lm_biom_trunk_mod = lm(biomass_trunk_tha ~ biomass_trunk_uav_mod_ha, biomass.gt)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_trunk_r2 = 
  round(summary(lm_biom_trunk_mod)$adj.r.squared,2)
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_trunk_slope = 
  round(coef(lm_biom_trunk_mod)[2],2)

lm_biom_trunk_allo = lm(biomass_trunk_tha ~ biomass_trunk_uav_allo_ha, biomass.gt)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_trunk_r2 = 
  round(summary(lm_biom_trunk_allo)$adj.r.squared,2)
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_trunk_slope = 
  round(coef(lm_biom_trunk_allo)[2],2)

kable(modele_uav_perf_plot %>% select(uav_method, biomass_trunk_bias,biomass_trunk_bias_perc, 
                                  biomass_trunk_mae,biomass_trunk_rmse,
                                  biomass_trunk_errabs,biomass_trunk_cv,
                                  biomass_trunk_r2,biomass_trunk_slope),caption = table.caption("Performances des méthodes drone pour l'estimation de la biomasse tronc des parcelles (en m3)"))%>% kable_styling(font_size = 12, bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)
```


Performances pour la biomasse totale

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

# performance pour la variable biomasse tronc
## bias absolu et relatif
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_tot_bias =
  round(mean(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_mod_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_tot_bias =
  round(mean(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_allo_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_tot_bias_perc =
  round(mean((biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_mod_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha) / biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha)*100,2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_tot_bias_perc =
  round(mean((biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_allo_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha) / biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha)*100,2)

## MAE et RMSE
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_tot_mae = 
  round(mae(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_mod_ha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_tot_mae = 
  round(mae(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_allo_ha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_tot_rmse = 
  round(rmse(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_mod_ha),2)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_tot_rmse = 
  round(rmse(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha, biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_allo_ha),2)

## CV (a partir de l'ecart type de l'erreur absolue)
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_tot_errabs = 
  sd(abs(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_mod_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha))*100

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_tot_errabs = 
  sd(abs(biomass.gt$biomass_tot_uav_allo_ha - biomass.gt$biomass_tot_tha))*100

modele_uav_perf_plot = modele_uav_perf_plot %>% mutate(biomass_tot_cv = round(biomass_tot_errabs / biomass_tot_mae,2))

## R2 et pente
lm_biom_tot_mod = lm(biomass_tot_tha ~ biomass_tot_uav_mod_ha, biomass.gt)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_tot_r2 = 
  round(summary(lm_biom_tot_mod)$adj.r.squared,2)
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_mod",]$biomass_tot_slope = 
  round(coef(lm_biom_tot_mod)[2],2)

lm_biom_tot_allo = lm(biomass_tot_tha ~ biomass_tot_uav_allo_ha, biomass.gt)

modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_tot_r2 = 
  round(summary(lm_biom_tot_allo)$adj.r.squared,2)
modele_uav_perf_plot[modele_uav_perf_plot$uav_method == "uav_allo",]$biomass_tot_slope = 
  round(coef(lm_biom_tot_allo)[2],2)

kable(modele_uav_perf_plot %>% select(uav_method, biomass_tot_bias,biomass_tot_bias_perc, 
                                  biomass_tot_mae,biomass_tot_rmse,
                                  biomass_tot_errabs,biomass_tot_cv,
                                  biomass_tot_r2,biomass_tot_slope),caption = table.caption("Performances des méthodes drone pour l'estimation de la biomasse totale des parcelles (en m3)"))%>% kable_styling(font_size = 12, bootstrap_options = "striped", full_width = T)
```

## Sauvegarde base de donnees

La base de données finale contenant les estimations de tous les modèles est sauvegardée dans le fichier "estimation_plot_modeles" (dossier data_output)

La base de donnees des performances des modles est sauvegardée dans le fichier "model_uav_perf_plot"

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

write.csv2(biomass.gt,"data_output/estimation_plot_modeles.csv",row.names = FALSE)
write.csv2(modele_uav_perf_plot,"data_output/model_uav_perf_plot.csv",row.names = FALSE)
```
